questions.answer_excerpt: Based on retrieved notes: # Smaller chunks experiment (256 tokens)  When chunk size was reduced to 256 tokens, recall@5 improved on the test question set. However, the generator started stitching unrelated  [doc_doc_2] #

Based on retrieved notes: # Baseline chunking (1024 tokens)  The initial baseline used 1024-token chunks with 128 overlap. Retrieval felt slow and often returned whole sections instead of the exact paragrap [doc_doc_0]
